hero_subtitle: SFTY preserves detailed audit logs that document every case action, review, escalation, and decision to support trusted compliance workflows for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit trails weaken without connected logs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear and consistent audit records when case creation, review, and escalation logs are stored separately. This fragmentation hinders defensible audit readiness and complicates bank due diligence and regulatory inspections for institutional digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates case creation, review, escalation and closure actions into a unified audit log that supports clear traceability and defensible evidence for institutional compliance and bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY records case actions, escalations and reviews with audit logs that preserve evidence integrity for structured compliance and bank due diligence workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond scattered audit logs. Defensible evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY structures case audit logs into connected evidence, decisions and role-based access to support traceable, audit-ready compliance and institutional trust workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives regulated VASPs a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit trails, supports bank due diligence and enforces governance within enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, audit logs and reporting to support regulated digital asset enterprises.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle case audit logs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY captures detailed audit logs for case creation, review, escalation and closure to support a clear trail of decisions and actions within compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision records and case documentation to support audit readiness and enable thorough compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect their outputs into one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured compliance cases, evidence, rule updates and audit trails for enterprise use.
final_title: Review audit logs supporting case workflows
final_description: See how SFTY preserves detailed audit logs for case creation, review, escalation and closure to support institutional compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
